title: dicoria canescens subsp. wetherillii
intro: Dicoria canescens subsp. wetherillii, also known as Wetherill's dicoria, is a perennial plant species within the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Dicoria canescens subsp. wetherillii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, where its leaves and roots are typically used to create a medicinal brew.
